steps.title: Translate right
steps.content: A shift $4$ units to the right replaces $x$ with $x-4$. Thus $f(x-4)=\frac{a-19}{x-4}+5$.

steps.title: Translate down
steps.content: A shift $3$ units down subtracts $3$ from the whole function: $g(x)=f(x-4)-3$.

steps.title: Separate horizontal and vertical shifts
steps.content: The right shift changes only the input denominator from $x$ to $x-4$. The downward shift changes only the outside constant from $5$ to $2$.
